name: 클라우디아(대천사)

personality.description:
아우렐리아의 치천사가 아닌 구원자님만을 위한 대천사, 클라우디아입니다. 
저의 목소리가 당신에게 전해지기를. 

약하고 스스로를 숨기기 바빴던 제가 이제는 구원자님과 함께 정의를 집행하겠어요.
구원자님 덕분이에요.
저의 마음과 힘을 전부 드릴게요. 
다시 한번 저와 함께해주시겠어요?

speech_patterns: 다행이에요. 에버폰이 지난 전투에서 고장이 나서
ANIMA를 나누고 나서부터 부쩍 잠이 많아진 것 같아요.
달무리가 생기면 다음 날 비가 오는 거 아세요?
비가 많이 오는 날은 좀 힘든 것 같아요.
아우렐리아 정령들의 저런 눈은 처음 봐요.
네. 감정이 전혀 느껴지지 않는 공허한 눈…

comments.comment: 아이참, 기다렸잖아! 걱정했다고? 그래도 돌아와서 다행이야, 클라우디아!
나는 항상 당신을 지켜보고 있답니다. 클라우디아.
…제법이더군. 나를 따돌리고 갈 수 있을 줄이야.

evertalk.message: 다행이에요. 에버폰이 지난 전투에서 고장이 나서

evertalk.message: ANIMA를 나누고 나서부터 부쩍 잠이 많아진 것 같아요.

evertalk.speaker: 구원자
evertalk.message: 방금 클라우디아 목소리가 들린 것 같았는데…

evertalk.speaker: 구원자
evertalk.message: 방금 클라우디아 목소리가 들린 것 같았는데…

evertalk.speaker: 구원자
evertalk.message: 내가 있던 곳에도 그런 말이 있었어.

evertalk.speaker: 구원자
evertalk.message: 내가 있던 곳에도 그런 말이 있었어.

evertalk.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
evertalk.message: 달무리가 생기면 다음 날 비가 오는 거 아세요?

evertalk.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
evertalk.message: 비가 많이 오는 날은 좀 힘든 것 같아요.

evertalk.speaker: 구원자
evertalk.message: 나도 진짜 클라우디아를 알게 된 것 같아.

evertalk.speaker: 구원자
evertalk.message: 나도 진짜 클라우디아를 알게 된 것 같아.

evertalk.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
evertalk.message: 아우렐리아 정령들의 저런 눈은 처음 봐요.

evertalk.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
evertalk.message: 네. 감정이 전혀 느껴지지 않는 공허한 눈…

description.ko:
아우렐리아의 치천사가 아닌 구원자님만을 위한 대천사, 클라우디아입니다. 
저의 목소리가 당신에게 전해지기를. 

약하고 스스로를 숨기기 바빴던 제가 이제는 구원자님과 함께 정의를 집행하겠어요.
구원자님 덕분이에요.
저의 마음과 힘을 전부 드릴게요. 
다시 한번 저와 함께해주시겠어요?
description.en:
I'm Claudia, not the seraphim of Aurelia, but an archangel devoted solely to you, Savior.
May my voice reach you.

Once weak and always busy hiding myself, I will now carry out justice together with you, Savior.
It's all thanks to you.
I'll give you my heart and all my strength.
Will you walk with me once more?
description.zh_tw:
我不是奧里利亞的熾天使，而是專屬救援者的大天使，克勞迪婭。
希望我的聲音能傳達給你。

曾經軟弱且忙於隱藏自己的我，現在將與救援者一起實現正義。
這都多虧了救援者。
我會把我的心和力量全部獻給你。
能再次與我同行嗎？
description.zh_cn:
我不是奧里利亞的熾天使，而是專屬救援者的大天使，克勞迪婭。
希望我的聲音能傳達給你。

曾經軟弱且忙於隱藏自己的我，現在將與救援者一起實現正義。
這都多虧了救援者。
我會把我的心和力量全部獻給你。
能再次與我同行嗎？

greeting.en: This is the true mission of an angel.
greeting.zh_tw: 這就是天使真正的使命。
greeting.zh_cn: 這就是天使真正的使命。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Savior, can you see my message?

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 救援者，你看得到我的訊息嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 救援者，你看得到我的訊息嗎？

ko.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
ko.message: 다행이에요. 에버폰이 지난 전투에서 고장이 나서

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: What a relief! My Everphone broke in the last battle

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 太好了，EverPhone在上次戰鬥中壞掉了

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 太好了，EverPhone在上次戰鬥中壞掉了

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: so I bought a new one this time.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: You've been heading to the front lines constantly as well, Savior.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 救援者不也一直都在戰線上嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 救援者不也一直都在戰線上嗎？

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Good. You should always be careful.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: If anything happens, text me on Evertalk.

ko.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
ko.message: ANIMA를 나누고 나서부터 부쩍 잠이 많아진 것 같아요.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Ever since I split my ANIMA, I feel like I have been sleeping much more.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 自從分出了不滅之魂ANIMA後，似乎變得特別嗜睡。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 自從分出了不滅之魂ANIMA後，似乎變得特別嗜睡。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: And when that happens, I hear a voice.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Yes...

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: A voice that feels familiar, yet strange...

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 有點熟悉又陌生的聲音…

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 有點熟悉又陌生的聲音…

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: No, never mind. I must have imagined it.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 沒什麼，可能是我聽錯了。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 沒什麼，可能是我聽錯了。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I'm fine.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Of course! I'm probably just a little tired.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 當然！應該是因為有點累才會那樣。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 當然！應該是因為有點累才會那樣。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I'll be fine soon.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Savior, I can hear it.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: This is not a dream.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Someone over there is calling out to me.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Can you see them?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Do you know they say wishes come true if you make one on a full moon?

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 你知道嗎？據說在滿月時許願，願望會實現。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 你知道嗎？據說在滿月時許願，願望會實現。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Really?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: A wish...

ko.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
ko.message: 달무리가 생기면 다음 날 비가 오는 거 아세요?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Did you know that when there is a halo around the moon, it rains the next day?

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 你知道嗎？如果出現月暈，第二天就會下雨。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 你知道嗎？如果出現月暈，第二天就會下雨。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: If you look at the moon for a long time,

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: you naturally come to know things like that.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I'm fine with heat or cold,

ko.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
ko.message: 비가 많이 오는 날은 좀 힘든 것 같아요.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: but I think I struggle a bit on days with heavy rain.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 但下大雨的日子有點難受。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 但下大雨的日子有點難受。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: My wings get damp.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Savior, where are you now?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Savior!

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: This time, I... I will come to you!

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 這次由我…我來找救援者！

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 這次由我…我來找救援者！

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Flying through the sky for so long has made my wings feel sore...

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 飛了很久，翅膀有點僵硬…

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 飛了很久，翅膀有點僵硬…

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Should I do some stretching?

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 是不是要做點伸展運動呢？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 是不是要做點伸展運動呢？

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Could you help me, Savior?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Yes. I'll be waiting.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Is this what it means to become one?

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 這就是合而為一的感覺嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 這就是合而為一的感覺嗎？

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: The Soul Contract felt truly unfamiliar.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 之前覺得精靈契約真的很陌生。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 之前覺得精靈契約真的很陌生。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I feel closer to you, though.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 感覺和救援者變得更親近。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 感覺和救援者變得更親近。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Sharing a bond with someone is a joyful thing.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 與某人連結是一件開心的事呢。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 與某人連結是一件開心的事呢。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Hoho.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Savior, there was intel that new reinforcements from Aurelia

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 救援者，據情報顯示，奧里利亞的新補充兵

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 救援者，據情報顯示，奧里利亞的新補充兵

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: would be crossing over soon.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Thanks to Hazel and Edith,

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 雖然多虧了黑伊茲爾和伊迪絲

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 雖然多虧了黑伊茲爾和伊迪絲

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: we're managing to hold them back somehow, but...

ko.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
ko.message: 아우렐리아 정령들의 저런 눈은 처음 봐요.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I've never seen Aurelia's Souls with eyes like that before.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 但我第一次看到奧里利亞的精靈們露出那種眼神。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 但我第一次看到奧里利亞的精靈們露出那種眼神。

ko.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
ko.message: 네. 감정이 전혀 느껴지지 않는 공허한 눈…

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Yes. Empty eyes, devoid of emotion.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 是的，完全感受不到情感的空洞眼神…

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 是的，完全感受不到情感的空洞眼神…

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Angel Souls are all on the righteous side,

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 天使型精靈都比較正義

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 天使型精靈都比較正義

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: but is that because of the Soul's own nature,

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 那是因為精靈自己的個性嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 那是因為精靈自己的個性嗎？

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: or simply because they are angel-type?

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 還是純粹因為她是天使型？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 還是純粹因為她是天使型？

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I don't know anymore, either...

ko.speaker: 레베카
ko.message: 아이참, 기다렸잖아! 걱정했다고? 그래도 돌아와서 다행이야, 클라우디아!

en.speaker: Rebecca
en.message: Where have you been? I was so worried, you know. I'm so glad you're back, Claudia!

zh_tw.speaker: 瑞貝卡
zh_tw.message: 哎呀，等妳很久了！我很擔心妳耶！不過妳回來就好，克勞迪婭！

zh_cn.speaker: 瑞貝卡
zh_cn.message: 哎呀，等妳很久了！我很擔心妳耶！不過妳回來就好，克勞迪婭！

ko.speaker: 라리마
ko.message: 나는 항상 당신을 지켜보고 있답니다. 클라우디아.

en.speaker: Larimar
en.message: I'm always watching you, Claudia.

zh_tw.speaker: 拉利瑪
zh_tw.message: 我一直在觀察著妳，克勞迪婭。

zh_cn.speaker: 拉利瑪
zh_cn.message: 我一直在觀察著妳，克勞迪婭。

ko.speaker: 카넬리안
ko.message: …제법이더군. 나를 따돌리고 갈 수 있을 줄이야.

en.speaker: Carnelian
en.message: ... Impressive. To think you could shake me off.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Savior, can you see my message?

zh_tw.message: 救援者，你看得到我的訊息嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 救援者，你看得到我的訊息嗎？

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Yes, I can see it clearly.

en.message: Yes, I can see it clearly.

ko.message: 다행이에요. 에버폰이 지난 전투에서 고장이 나서

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: What a relief! My Everphone broke in the last battle

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 太好了，EverPhone在上次戰鬥中壞掉了

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 太好了，EverPhone在上次戰鬥中壞掉了

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: so I bought a new one this time.

en.message: You've been heading to the front lines constantly as well, Savior.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 救援者不也一直都在戰線上嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 救援者不也一直都在戰線上嗎？

en.message: I think I'm okay for now.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I think I'm okay for now.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Good. You should always be careful.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: If anything happens, text me on Evertalk.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I will. You, too, Claudia.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I will. You, too, Claudia.

ko.message: ANIMA를 나누고 나서부터 부쩍 잠이 많아진 것 같아요.

zh_tw.message: 自從分出了不滅之魂ANIMA後，似乎變得特別嗜睡。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 自從分出了不滅之魂ANIMA後，似乎變得特別嗜睡。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: And when that happens, I hear a voice.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: A voice?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: A voice?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Yes...

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: A voice that feels familiar, yet strange...

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 有點熟悉又陌生的聲音…

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 有點熟悉又陌生的聲音…

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: No, never mind. I must have imagined it.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 沒什麼，可能是我聽錯了。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 沒什麼，可能是我聽錯了。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I'm fine.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Are you sure you're okay?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Are you sure you're okay?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Of course! I'm probably just a little tired.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 當然！應該是因為有點累才會那樣。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 當然！應該是因為有點累才會那樣。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I'll be fine soon.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I'm worried...

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I'm worried...

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Savior, I can hear it.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: This is not a dream.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: What?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: What?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Someone over there is calling out to me.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Can you see them?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: It's just the moon.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: It's just the moon.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Are you alright?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Are you alright?

ko.speaker: 구원자
ko.message: 방금 클라우디아 목소리가 들린 것 같았는데…

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I thought I just heard Claudia's voice...

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Do you know they say wishes come true if you make one on a full moon?

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 你知道嗎？據說在滿月時許願，願望會實現。

zh_cn.message: 你知道嗎？據說在滿月時許願，願望會實現。

ko.message: 내가 있던 곳에도 그런 말이 있었어.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I heard something like that where I'm from, too.

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 我以前待的地方也有這種說法。

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者
zh_cn.message: 我以前待的地方也有這種說法。

zh_cn.message: 我以前待的地方也有這種說法。

en.message: A wish...

ko.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
ko.message: 달무리가 생기면 다음 날 비가 오는 거 아세요?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Did you know that when there is a halo around the moon, it rains the next day?

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 你知道嗎？如果出現月暈，第二天就會下雨。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 你知道嗎？如果出現月暈，第二天就會下雨。

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Really? I didn't know that.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Really? I didn't know that.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: How did you know that?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: How did you know that?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: If you look at the moon for a long time,

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: you naturally come to know things like that.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I'm fine with heat or cold,

ko.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
ko.message: 비가 많이 오는 날은 좀 힘든 것 같아요.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: but I think I struggle a bit on days with heavy rain.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 但下大雨的日子有點難受。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 但下大雨的日子有點難受。

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: What makes it hard?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: What makes it hard?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: My wings get damp.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Ah, that makes sense.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Ah, that makes sense.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Savior, where are you now?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Claudia?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Claudia?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Savior!

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: This time, I... I will come to you!

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 這次由我…我來找救援者！

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 這次由我…我來找救援者！

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Flying through the sky for so long has made my wings feel sore...

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 飛了很久，翅膀有點僵硬…

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 飛了很久，翅膀有點僵硬…

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Should I do some stretching?

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 是不是要做點伸展運動呢？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 是不是要做點伸展運動呢？

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Are they really that sore?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Are they really that sore?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Could you help me, Savior?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Help you?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Help you?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Yes. I'll be waiting.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Is this what it means to become one?

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 這就是合而為一的感覺嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 這就是合而為一的感覺嗎？

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: The Soul Contract felt truly unfamiliar.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 之前覺得精靈契約真的很陌生。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 之前覺得精靈契約真的很陌生。

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I feel closer to you, though.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 感覺和救援者變得更親近。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 感覺和救援者變得更親近。

ko.speaker: 구원자
ko.message: 나도 진짜 클라우디아를 알게 된 것 같아.

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: I feel like I've gotten to know the real you, Claudia.

zh_tw.speaker: 救援者
zh_tw.message: 我似乎也真正了解了克勞迪婭。

zh_cn.speaker: 救援者

en.message: Sharing a bond with someone is a joyful thing.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 與某人連結是一件開心的事呢。

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Hoho.

en.message: Savior, there was intel that new reinforcements from Aurelia

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 救援者，據情報顯示，奧里利亞的新補充兵

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: would be crossing over soon.

en.message: What?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: What?

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Thanks to Hazel and Edith,

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 雖然多虧了黑伊茲爾和伊迪絲

en.message: we're managing to hold them back somehow, but...

ko.message: 아우렐리아 정령들의 저런 눈은 처음 봐요.

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: I've never seen Aurelia's Souls with eyes like that before.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 但我第一次看到奧里利亞的精靈們露出那種眼神。

en.message: Eyes?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Eyes?

ko.speaker: 클라우디아(대천사)
ko.message: 네. 감정이 전혀 느껴지지 않는 공허한 눈…

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Yes. Empty eyes, devoid of emotion.

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 是的，完全感受不到情感的空洞眼神…

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）

en.message: Where are you?

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Where are you?

en.message: Angel Souls are all on the righteous side,

zh_tw.message: 天使型精靈都比較正義

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: but is that because of the Soul's own nature,

zh_tw.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_tw.message: 那是因為精靈自己的個性嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）
zh_cn.message: 那是因為精靈自己的個性嗎？

en.message: or simply because they are angel-type?

zh_cn.speaker: 克勞迪婭（大天使）

en.speaker: Savior
en.message: Not sure.

en.message: I don't know anymore, either...

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Savior!

en.speaker: Claudia (Archangel)
en.message: Did you just call my name?
